title: Chapter 2: The Rise of New Stars

text_block_list.text:
A few days after watching that race, while doing paperwork 
in the trainer's room, I heard a knock at the door.

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: E-Excuse me… I hope I'm not bothering your work, Trainer.
choice_data_list: Oh, it's you! What brings you here today?
Hey, it's you! What brings you here today?

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
Umm, well… I'm sorry about what happened 
at the Tokyo Racecourse…!

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
For making you worry, and for the energy bar… So, today 
I came to apologize, and… although it's just a small token 
of my gratitude, I made some offal stew.
choice_data_list: O-Offal stew? You put in all that effort for me?

text_block_list.text:
Surprised by her strong sense of duty, I promptly dug 
into the still warm dish… It's delicious! The salty flavor 
is perfectly balanced.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Ah… My name is Chrono Genesis. 
I'm currently serving on the PR committee…
choice_data_list: Chrono Genesis… Ah, come to think of it…

text_block_list.text:
As I discovered the other day, she was the one writing 
my favorite column, "Idle History Talk". In other words, 
the person standing in front of me right now is…
choice_data_list: Writer C! I absolutely love your column!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Wah! N-No way…! That's not much more 
than some anecdotal ramblings…!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: B-But, umm… I'm happy to hear you say that…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
How should I put it, yes… It's really just a hobby of mine… 
So, I didn't think anyone was actually reading it…
choice_data_list: <size=36>That's not true! …Want me to show you proof?</size>
<size=36>That's not true! …Want me to show you proof?</size>

text_block_list.text:
I brought out my scrapbook, where I kept clippings of 
the column that I found most interesting. When I told her 
that the recent one on St. Lite was amazing as well…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, this many… T-Thank you so much…! 
Umm, well… I…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I-I'll keep doing my best. From here on out… Hehe.

A few days after that exchange, I went to watch 
a practice race and spotted her there as well.

text_block_list.name: Gran Alegria
text_block_list.text: Good mile-ning! Let's have a great race today, Love, Chrono!

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Yes, same to you both. Of course, I'll be the one 
reporting my victory to my followers on today's stream♡

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: N-Nice to race with you… I'll be sure to give it my all as well.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…The track condition is good. Since there's distance before 
the second and third corners, the battle for the front won't be 
too fierce. A nine horsegirl field. Predicted pacesetters: one.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
The pace will likely be slow… There are a few matching races 
in history. I just need to figure out which one matches closest 
based on how it unfolds…

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
The practice race is starting, 1800 m on turf… 
And they're all off!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Hahh, hah, hahh, hah

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(Number four is moving up, looking like she can't hold back. 
This is… The first thing that comes to mind is…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: The Ivy Stakes… the year number seven won…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(The winning horsegirl back then was a pacer, 
so I'm not in a bad place.)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(I still have stamina left. My positioning is good. 
Now I just need the right timing…)

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Hahh… Right here!!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Coming out of the fourth corner and into the homestretch, 
Loves Only You is steadily pushing up the pack!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Ngh…!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(It's okay. I don't need to chase her yet. History provides 
the template. I'll make my move from a winning position!)

text_block_list.name: Gran Alegria
text_block_list.text: Aaalright, here I gooo… Milerrrrr☆

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (…Ghk! Gran too…! In this case… No, even so…!)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Trust in history!

…In more ways than one, I couldn't take my eyes 
off Chrono Genesis. Her calculated pace distribution. 
Her sharp final spurt. Her belief in victory ——
She had it all. And yet… Why did it seem like she was somehow…

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
First place goes to Loves Only You! It's Loves Only You! 
Gran Alegria and Chrono Genesis fall agonizingly short!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Haah, haah, hahh… A neck behind in third place…

text_block_list.name: Gran Alegria
text_block_list.text:
…Gah! As expected of my rivals! More! I need to do even more 
than I am now. On my pride as the Queen of the Mile.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text:
Hehe… It was such a close call, yet your fighting spirit is blazing. 
I guess I'll have to increase my training, too.

That night, as I was walking down the hallway to go home, 
I saw light spilling out from the library.
choice_data_list: Huh… Did someone forget to turn the lights off?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …………More.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(I need to dig deeper into racing history. After all, everything 
is in history. What Chrono Genesis needs… the answer to that 
must be there, too.)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I'm still lacking… For my dream, I have to…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (If I'm lacking, I have to compensate.)

…Her intense, driven demeanor reminded me of 
when she nearly collapsed at the Tokyo Racecourse. 
Before I knew it, I was calling out to her.
choice_data_list: It's not good to push yourself too hard.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Ah… Trainer…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: No, but… I have to do this. …I'm sorry.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: ……Huh?

I piled up documents that seemed like they would make useful 
reference next to her, such as "The Past and Future of the Tokyo Racecourse" and "The History of the Twinkle Series".
choice_data_list: I'll just leave these right here.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…Ah. I-I'm sorry. Having you help me gather documents… 
until this late at night…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: ……Trainer…

To tell the truth, this was also a form of surveillance. 
That way, if Chrono Genesis pushed herself too hard, 
I could immediately step in to support her.

In other words, I was doing it for selfish reasons, 
so I didn't mind… But there was one thing that 
bothered me, so I casually tried asking her.
choice_data_list: But… why do you go to such lengths?
But… why do you go to such lengths?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I want to become a part of history.
